question.content: For the same compression task, assume ideal-gas nitrogen with k=1.394 and compute both final temperature and minimum compression work. Output exactly two integers separated by one comma in the order T2,Wmin, plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text. Answer format: `T2,Wmin`, with the two integers separated by commas; do not include units, explanatory text, or equals signs.

step_1.content: Use ideal-gas reversible-adiabatic relation for T2 and then compute work from k/(k-1)*R*(T1-T2).
step_1.key_point: Use ideal-gas reversible-adiabatic relation for T2 and then compute work from k/(k-1)*R*(T1-T2).

step_3.content: Analyze panel 1 of 2 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_3.key_point: Set up the governing relation for both final temperature and minimum compression work.

step_5.content: Return T2 and Wmin in the required order.
step_5.key_point: Return T2 and Wmin in the required order.
